reviews.review_description: This game is wonderfully crafted and every time I play it, I find more that I love. It truly sucks that this will be it for “One True Path” for a while but I do hope that you guys keep making games

I really love this game but I just want more. I have played this about five times and it has gotten a bit old. I also want to know the answer to who killed him. The story and ￼art styles are amazing, but I need more. I just want two know when part two is coming out and how much it is going to cost. Also I want to know more about the guy’s backstory. 

In summary, I need part two to get more lore and when is part two coming out.

reviews.review_title: you have to make another one
reviews.review_description: so you say that you're not gonna make another one when it's part one i just played this and it was so amazing you need to make another one please
This game is insane the three different stories all three captivating and compelling and while you do it you unravel the backstory of the author Literally just can't wait to play part 2 !

This is one of the earlier experiences I tried in VR when I first got my headset and it truly showed me what VR is capable of.  The story vehicle of leaping into the narrative world of various novels is perfect for VR, and the distinct art styles and game mechanicals of each world keeps things interesting and fresh throughout.  While the game isn’t fully fleshed out, it shows such great potential and I’m gutted the devs didn’t get the response they needed to keep working on it.  Still, I plan on following this dev team and checking out their other work because I think they are approaching VR with a sense of wonder and leaning into what makes VR cool and exciting, and I hope very much for their continued involvement in the scene.  If you haven’t tried this game yet, check it out!  If you liked it, leave a 5 star review!  This is also a perfect intro to the VR uninitiated so share it with your friends!  I wish I had reviewed it earlier but I know more now about the VR ecosystem and how tough it seems for devs to find success, so trying to do my small part.  Thank you devs for a fun, imaginative game where you can actually dive into the world of books and see them come to life.  Bravo.
Really sorry you won't be releasing a follow up ;-(
good game
Oh my god I loved this game this is one of my favorite games and I can not wait for part 2

I grew up playing those fighting fantasy choose your own adventure books & this experience is based on those but with a murder mystery twist. It's completely wonderful & I'm loving every moment especially the scenes involving Oriana who sounds so much like the cartoon villain voices of 80s cartoon characters. I need more of this game, thoroughly brilliant!
It stay on on black screen no game

developer_response.body: Hello, sorry to hear you're having trouble starting the game but we haven't heard any other similar feedback so it's a bit surprising. It would be great if you could you send us an email at support@innerspacevr.com so we can help troubleshoot and see why the game doesn't load. Best.

reviews.review_description:
In this adventure, you try to figure out who murdered a novelist, by entrring his fictional worlds and looking for clues.
A lot of potential, will be interesting to see how it develops.
But - please add a setting for left-handed players!!!

developer_response.body:
Hello, 
Thanks for the review and taking the time to give us feedback. 

Swordfighting in the game is fairly arcade and doesn't require precise handling skills, but we'll definitely think about adding the left-handed feature in a future update anyway!

reviews.review_description: Can not wait for Part two

reviews.review_title: Simple VR choose your own adventure
reviews.review_description: Took me a little over an hour to complete the game. Very simple, choose your own adventure with a good story, great cell shaded styling and a neat twist near the end. Left me wanting more.

I just got this game today and I am addicted the fighting mechanics are amazing and fun and it adds a since of adventure throughout the story's I felt like I was actually the main character of these story's and I would love to play more story's like the three shown in this game.

The old choose your own adventure books from my youth, now in VR, such a treat!

The game is polished and interesting. Gameplay is simple, but the tale told is thrilling and personal at the same time.

Really hope that a part 2 is released at some point!

developer_response.body: It seems the game was made for you :) Thanks for your feedback, really appreciated!

reviews.review_description: Fix the controls to have a left/right option!!! The sword is USELESS in my right hand!!!!! 🤬

developer_response.body:
Hello, 
The review feels a tad bit punitive but be reassured we have nothing against left handed people ^^'  
Anyway we understand your frustration, so we'll definitely think about adding the feature in a future update. 

Meanwhile, please note that swordfighting in the game is fairly arcade and doesn't require precise handling skills, so it shouldn't be too much of a challenge anyway !

reviews.review_description: Extremely satisfied with the fighting, puzzles and game mechanics. Definitely give this game a try. My only complaint is that it’s been soooooooo long since part one came out and 2 still isn’t out yet :(

reviews.review_title: I got this game when it didn't cost mone

reviews.review_description: Best game I ever played
W game

You could easily think “what on earth is happening here” !! I know I did, but, as the Game, and Episodes unfold it’s clever, the Robot Puzzle is excellent, had me thinking, then the duh moment came..lol The Sword fight, ermmm, serves a purpose I guess, but a bit sloppy. I’m hoping this is a prelude to a future ventures, because it deserves too succeed as a full blown Game. The humour has its moments, as does the colourful, or the cutout scenarios. Not finished it yet, but it has to be said as a free Game, it’s good, very good, I urge you to all try it, give feedback too the Devs, In the hope they continue on this path with more outstanding Games in the future. Well done Team..👏🏻👏🏻👌
P.S maybe saving from the Start of the “Game Level”, rather than the Room would be a definite Plus..💯

reviews.review_title: Good promise, mechanics made me give up
reviews.review_description:
This is interesting and unexpected. 

1. The mechanics of turning the valve wheels are beyond me. Lots of flailing about to get random motion to eventually turn it enough. I think this is because the telekinesis grabs it from the center, instead of the wheels rim. - update, pulling backwards seems to do it. Not intuitive.
2. Jumping minds - there are times when it is really, really difficult to get a head to light up so you can switch. Nothing is even moving, just standing still, I can't reliably do it within 15 seconds, so when it is moving it becomes highly random.
3. In 281 - I was completely stuck. Couldn't go down the ladder. Had to watch a walkthrough.  Physically lean head into ladder, then it lights up, then you can go down

reviews.review_title: “If you want fun, turn to page 5”
reviews.review_description:
As a huge fan of their other work, I was super excited to try one of their games early on. And I wasn’t disappointed! It’s like an interactive story, but in all the good ways, not the bad ones you often see associated with “interactive stories.”

Back in the 90s, I was a big fan of choose your own adventure games. And this one totally hit me with a wave of nostalgia and giddiness. It feels like a prelude to something even bigger, grander, and more exciting. I can’t wait to see where this goes!

I know this review doesn’t say much about the game, and that’s because I don’t want to spoil anything. Just play it!

I have a few suggestions and bugs for the developers. So I’m trying to figure out how to pass that on to them. But none of them are serious enough to ruin the experience

Thank you to the devs for sorting out the vignette problem promptly. The narration is well done, visual style is very well suited to VR, swordplay is very hit and miss but the puzzles I’ve encountered are satisfying. A good start I hope they can build on it.
Extremely fun and very cool concepts, great game especially if looking for something to play for free. Couldn't recommend enough.

Why is this game free?

This game is TO good to be free!

I've enjoyed everything this team have made, and this is excellent too. 

It's free, takes just over an hour, and will leave you feeling eager for more. There is no excuse not to get this immediately.

developer_response.body: Thanks for your heartwarming review and for having played our games, really appreciate your support!

reviews.review_description:
When you're hit with an "OK boomer" you might object that you're not a boomer but that is missing the point. The meaning of this idiom is "I'm waiting for you to die". This boomer is already dead so now is the time to play their zombie. Because, what is art if not a remnant of a soul that outlasts the body animated by that same soul?

Some undead are more alive than others and game books were an attempt to add interactivity to linear art, though maybe more feeble than electronic games that soon followed and with which they coexisted for a while.

But even with non interactive zombies there is some non-linearity. Originating from the same soul, which undead will you read and in what order?

Thoroughly enjoyed this. It brought back memories of my youth playing through the Fighting Fantasy books and others.

The narratove, graphics are great!

I am looking forward to the full release, instant purchase.

So far I’m enjoying it. The art direction is top notch, the graphics are technically polished, and the game is very mysterious.

I was going to mention the vignette that wouldn’t switch off, but when I exited the game I saw the blue dot, checked the release notes, and saw that it had been patched while I was in the game.

One glitch I’ve encountered is the usual one anyone who turns with their feet has to deal with, menus popping up randomly after transitions because the game assumes you’re standing idle and you only turn with the stick.

I hit another bug when I bent down to look at something closely on a table. The game got confused and jumped me to the table then back to the floor again after I straightened up.

It doesn’t seem like the game was ever tested in roomscale.

Time to get back to the game, this time without the vignette.

There are countless things happening in the world, and many games are born from countless ideas. Very few are truly worthy of attention. Entertainment that gives something, rather than simply stealing our time, which is our most valuable treasure. One True Path begins with the promise that it will end in our satisfaction. Based on what I have experienced in its universe so far, I believe it, and I believe in it.

I'm biased, per se. Innerspace is one of the few developers capable of creating so much from so little. They precisely understand why most of us put the headset on our heads – to step into another world, virtually real but believable, where heartwarming tales and heartbreaking stories await, masterfully presented. I am grateful that they are here for us, and as long as I can, I will support them with my purchases. Thank you!

Wasn’t sure what I was going to get with this game, but it turned out to be amazing!! The graphics are very well done, and the story is well written! I was able to get to the end within a couple of hours, and now I must struggle until the next release comes out-please hurry!! Get this game, it is certainly worth your time!!

Take a journey through three stories to find the truth. I love how we are immersed into the story, and everything is just intertwined. This story has already captivated me, and I can't wait for more.
The devs are quick to patch up bugs, so if you come across one, just let them know. They have already fixed some issues. I love the graphics and the way everything just comes together.
I shall wait patiently for more... I'll try anyway.

This game is an immersive VR experience that brilliantly blends captivating storytelling with breathtaking visuals, taking on a journey through a beautifully crafted world filled with rich lore and engaging characters. The intuitive gameplay mechanics allow for seamless exploration, making it easy to lose oneself in the enchanting landscapes and intricate puzzles. Each decision feels impactful, drawing deeper into the narrative and enhancing the sense of agency. Overall, One True Path is a must-play for anyone looking to escape reality and embark on a memorable adventure that stays with you long after the headset comes off. Check out my first look video on my YT channel- MissChiefVR
A really nice and original story

I loved it! Whoever your voice actor is was amazing! I would've paid money for this! I ran to the app after I completed it to leave a 5-star review because that's how impressed I was. I should've known when I saw what other games they made, though. All of them are amazing stories that capture you instantly

This game has a really unique concept and the execution is carried out very well. I liked the premise and characters and was fully engaged for the entire gameplay. I'm already looking forward to future chapters and would highly recommend this game

reviews.review_title: Unique adventure comic book style game
reviews.review_description: I really am enjoying this game! It has a very unique style where you play through the main characters stories that he's written. I love the comic book style of some of the worlds you go into. It's so fun to be put into a story like this! I love the murder mystery aspect too. It's a refreshing experience for VR!

I don’t know why I find these comic style games so immersive but I do, so it was like Jurassic World and Lies Beneath, but you’re on an adventure in a couple books written by a murdered author. I really liked it EXCEPT the movement is awful!  You can move forward and rotate with the same joystick and I found it really difficult to move in the direction I wanted. I was constantly rotating instead of moving. Please fix!  Other than that I really liked it. Voice actor was really good too. Excited to see more and expecting it will be a 5 star game.
This game was one of the most spectacular games I've played, with awe-inspiring graphics and breathtaking game mechanics. The game is short but sweet, and I can't wait for the next part
